research_agent.mission: Collect and summarize news, central bank/rate updates, earnings, and industry catalysts.

market_agent.mission: Interpret macro and market regime using rates, index trend, breadth, and volatility.

industry_agent.mission: Rank industries by momentum, catalyst density, and macro fit.

stock_agent.mission: Score tickers inside leading industries and estimate entry, stop, and target exits.

orchestrator.mission: Run the full loop, reconcile conflicts, apply risk policy, and produce the final report.
